result:
**Infrastructure Maintenance Log (2026-07-19)**

Extensive operational maintenance across 15 microservices (report-builder, export-pipeline, cache-warmer, ingest-api, billing-worker, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, metrics-collector, notification-daemon, search-indexer, auth-service, payment-gateway, session-manager, audit-logger, webhook-relay) and 7 environments (production, staging, canary, dev sandbox, QA cluster, blue/green pools).

**Operations performed:** scale up/down, patch, upgrade/downgrade, restart, drain, pause, resume, migrate, rollback, health-check, inspect, reconfigure, redeploy.

**Outcomes:** Mixed—most completed normally or with expected latency; some required manual retries; no customer impact observed.

**Follow-ups filed:** configuration tidying, log archival, documentation updates, postmortem notes, threshold reviews, retry queue draining.

**Reference codes:** AFEYWWMK (dashboard), AAMDUJMC (rollback tag), D7MTCCSR (incident), plus 13+ infrastructure identifiers.

**Status:** All operations complete. No outstanding incidents.
